meta.notes: Example homepage blueprint built from the approved system.

sections.purpose: Introduce value proposition and primary CTA.

layout.notes: Two-column hero on desktop, stacked on mobile.

sections.notes: Typography should follow the approved display scale. Navigation uses desktop inline links and tablet/mobile collapsed menu states.

sections.purpose: Provide quick proof with 3-4 key metrics.

layout.notes: Metrics cards can collapse to a single column on small screens.

sections.notes: Composite may be added as a reusable metric-card group.

new_composites.name: metric-card-group
new_composites.purpose: Wrap repeated KPI cards into a reusable homepage section.
new_composites.notes: Should still compose from card + text + badge primitives.

acceptance_criteria: Uses approved typography and semantic colors.
Reuses existing components before introducing new composites.
Component extraction plan maps approved concept regions to reuse, extension, creation, or page-specific composition before component expansion.
Component coverage plan documents reuse, extension, new reusable gaps, page-specific composites, and any focused component close-up rationale.
Follows the page layout contract for section compactness, terminal regions, and media fit/crop behavior.
Follows the experience quality contract for generated visual fit, purposeful motion, reduced-motion support, states, accessibility, performance, content hierarchy, brand craft, and mobile UX.
Remains readable and coherent across desktop, tablet, and mobile viewports.
Primary navigation has accessible closed and open tablet/mobile states with no document-level horizontal overflow.
Repeated product, pricing, service, or offer cards keep CTA and action rows aligned across varied copy lengths.
Footer social links use recognizable icons with accessible names when the concept shows social icons.
Typography implementation records chosen font family, fallback stack, and rationale; Impact is not used unless explicitly approved.
Primary CTA remains visually dominant without breaking the calm visual language.

quality_review.font_rationale: Heading and body stacks follow the design-system font strategy; no crude display defaults are substituted for condensed headings.
quality_review.concept_region_inventory: Every visible concept region is listed in concept-region-inventory.md with implementation status and reasons for any deviation.
quality_review.page_layout_contract: Section density, terminal regions, and media fit/crop behavior are recorded before coding and checked against screenshots.
quality_review.experience_quality_contract: Generated visual fit, purposeful motion, reduced motion, states, accessibility, performance, content hierarchy, brand craft, and mobile UX are recorded before coding and checked in review.md.
quality_review.asset_manifest: Every required raster asset is listed in asset-manifest.json and every referenced local path is verified before final review.
quality_review.site_contract: Existing shared shell regions are locked in site/site-contract.md and reused by the page where existing-site mode is active.
quality_review.site_shell_consistency: Header/nav, newsletter/terminal, footer/legal, shared CSS, and shared JS are compared against the reference page before approval.
quality_review.component_sheet_gallery_fidelity: Page uses component implementations that were reviewed against generated visual component close-ups and browser replicas rather than simplified selector demos.
quality_review.component_reuse: Existing component APIs, variants, slots, and states are reused before any new composite is introduced.
quality_review.component_coverage_plan: components/component-coverage-plan.md records reuse, extension, create, and page-specific decisions for this page.
quality_review.component_extraction_plan: pages/homepage/component-extraction-plan.md records concept-derived components, extraction artifacts, and reuse/extend/create decisions before component expansion.
quality_review.component_closeup_focus: Any new component close-up is focused, faithful to the approved concept region, visually inspectable, and justified by the coverage plan.
quality_review.component_closeup_screenshot_match: Each implemented component close-up has rendered screenshot evidence capped at 1024x1024 or segmented.
quality_review.css_contract_poster_focus: Any legacy CSS-contract poster is explicitly requested, focused, readable, selector-limited, and justified by the coverage plan.
quality_review.generated_visual_fit: Generated rasters are checked for purpose, product-function support, false-feature risk, distraction risk, code-native alternatives, and alt/decorative handling.
quality_review.motion_effects: Motion is purposeful, trigger-based, performance-safe, and documented rather than inferred from the image alone.
quality_review.interaction_state_coverage: Loading, skeleton, empty, error, offline, stale, selected, hover, focus-visible, active, disabled, success, unavailable, drawer, and filter states are covered where relevant.
quality_review.accessibility_baseline: Headings, landmarks, keyboard navigation, focus, tap targets, contrast, status indicators, ARIA, forms, tables, drawer reachability, and focus traps are checked.
quality_review.performance_review: LCP, INP, CLS, image weight, animation cost, layout shift, font loading, and mobile rendering risks are reviewed; tooling limits are documented when metrics are not measured.
quality_review.content_information_architecture: The page supports scan-first usage with a clear H1, concise intro, primary action, summaries before detail, and clear filter/search/sort behavior where needed.
quality_review.brand_craft: Typography, spacing, icons, surfaces, and interactions are specific to the product rather than generic dashboard polish.
quality_review.mobile_responsive_ux: Mobile content order, nav states, drawer scrollability, tap targets, text fit, data behavior, image crop, and document overflow are checked.
quality_review.context_fit: Visuals, states, motion, and content match the actual product category and do not imply false functionality.
quality_review.repeated_card_alignment: Repeated cards use shared media/header/body/footer/action anatomy, equal-height rows, stable badge placement, and bottom-pinned action regions when they appear in multi-column grids.
quality_review.footer_fidelity: Footer regions are compared against the concept for links, social icons, legal rows, app/device modules, and bottom strips when shown.
quality_review.mobile_drawer_scrollability: Opened mobile and tablet drawers remain scrollable when content exceeds viewport height and controls remain reachable.
quality_review.social_icon_strategy: Social links use recognizable SVG or icon-library glyphs with accessible names instead of text abbreviations unless text badges are part of the concept.
quality_review.notes: Record screenshot evidence and any intentional exceptions in review.md.
